animation.init: Stack Initialization: Preparing to calculate f({{targetN}})
animation.push_start: Call f({{n}}): Preparing to push onto the stack from the right
animation.push_assign: f({{n}}) successfully placed in the stack slot
animation.base_case: Base Case reached: f({{n}}) = {{val}}, starting backtracking and multiplication
animation.calc_start: Preparing to multiply the returned value of f({{current_f}}-1) ({{child_val}}) by current value ({{current_val}})
animation.pop_right: f({{returned_f}}) completed returning {{returned_val}}, popped and exiting to the right
animation.done: Recursion complete! Final result f({{targetN}}) = {{final_result}} calculated successfully
